name: Japan
style_of_play: High-intensity pressing with quick passing combinations and coordinated team movement.
weaknesses: physical mismatch against top European/South American sides
can struggle against deep low blocks
tactical_summary: Press as a unit with triggers based on backward passes; build through quick one-touch passing and third-man runs. Fullbacks tuck in to form a back three in possession.
why_it_matters: Japan's collective pressing and technical improvement make them one of the most tactically sophisticated Asian teams in World Cup history.
injury_news: Placeholder — no live injury feed connected yet.
